name: Affiliated Group Air Transportation Exclusion

eligibility.description: One member of an affiliated group must own or lease the aircraft, and the aircraft must not be available for hire by persons outside the group (determined on a flight-by-flight basis).

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Eliminates federal air transportation excise taxes on payments made between members of an affiliated group for the use of a private aircraft.
